title: GENERAL LEGAL AID - 211info
text: OREGON LAW CENTER GRANTS PASS REGIONAL OFFICE GENERAL LEGAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal counseling and/or representation for low-income individuals who need assistance with routine legal matters (civil, non-criminal), usually regarding housing, public benefits, family, or elder law. Offers a senior law hotline. Some locations may offer additional services. 424 NW 6th Street Suite 102 Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Low-income individuals who are at or below 125% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Monday-Thursday 1pm-4pm (541) 471-3033 1-4 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 471-3033 Hotline Senior Law Thursday 1pm-4pm (541) 476-1058 Intake Monday-Thursday 1pm-4pm Hotline (541) 471-3033 Senior Law Thursday 1pm-4pm Intake (541) 476-1058 Monday-Thursday 1pm-4pm INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 1pm-4pm Services: Elder Law General Legal Aid Tenant Rights Information/Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LAW CENTER GRANTS PASS REGIONAL OFFICE
